case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. JOSE YONI NOEL TUN KU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TUN KU, JOSE YONI NOEL
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY 1, 2020 AT 10 A.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SANTA CASTILLO ASSISTANT MANAGER. DEFENDANT JOSE YONI NOEL TUN KU IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
